message:
refactor(cancel): extract restore_retry_state and remove double-check read lock

Cleanup coordinator changes:
1. Removes the outer early-return read lock in register_pending() that
   raced with retry-state restoration. The write lock on pending is now
   acquired first, then the completed set is checked under that lock,
   closing the window where restore could reopen an object between the
   outer read check and the write lock acquisition.

2. Extracts the repeated three-step retry-state restoration pattern
   (re-insert handler, re-insert pending set, remove from completed)
   into a single restore_retry_state() method, called from both the
   budget-exhaustion and handler-error paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
